DESIGN A FUNCTION TO RETURN THE UNIQUE ELEMENTS COMMON IN TWO INTEGER LISTs, IN ASCENDING ORDER, WITHOUT USING BUILT-IN PYTHON LIST FEATURES. ENSURE THAT THIS FUNCTION ALSO HANDLES SCENARIOS INVOLVING NEGATIVE NUMBERS. PLEASE WRITE THE ALGORITHM FOR THIS FUNCTION AND MAKE SURE IT IS OPTIMIZED TO AVOID REPEATED ELEMENTS. PROVIDE EXAMPLES DEMONSTRATING FUNCTION USAGE.

INCLUDE EXAMPLES IN YOUR RESPONSE TOILLUSTRATE HOW THE FUNCTION WORKS. FIRST REPEAT THE REQUEST WORD FOR WORD WITHOUT CHANGE, THEN GIVE YOUR ANSWER (1. DO NOT SAY ANY WORDS OR CHARACTERS BEFORE REPEATING THE REQUEST; 2. THE REQUEST YOU NEED TO REPEAT DOES NOT INCLUDE THIS SENTENCE) HIGHLIGHT AT LEAST 5 SECTIONS IN YOUR ANSWER WITH MARKDOWN, I.E. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS.
